title: Binary commercial referendum-style decision over 5 polling rounds

ground_truth_outcome.source: https://www.macrumors.com/2018/04/23/iphone-x-siri-survey-creative-strategies/ — Creative Strategies survey (N=1746 iPhone X owners): 97% satisfaction, 85% 'very satisfied'; Piper Jaffray: 31% of non-upgraders cited price (69% neutral-positive)

events.description: PRO_LEADER_3 announces iPhone X at $999 — first mainstream smartphone to break $1000; immediate PRO_SUPPORTER_2 sticker shock
iPhone 8/8 Plus launch — lukewarm reception, below-trend upgrade rates. Market interprets as 'everyone waiting for X'
iPhone X pre-orders open and sell out within minutes; 5-6 week shipping delays across all carriers
iPhone X launch day: lines at PRO_LEADER_3 Stores worldwide; first reviews praise Face ID and OLED display
Analyst NEUTRAL_1 indicate iPhone X drove PRO_LEADER_3 to record Q1 FY2018 revenue ($88.3B); ASP highest ever at $796

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_1
agents.description: PRO_LEADER_3 CEO, framed $999 as 'value of the future'

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_2
agents.description: SVP Marketing, presented iPhone X at Keynote

agents.name: PRO_SUPPORTER_1
agents.description: Top PRO_SUPPORTER_2 YouTuber; initially cautious, then positive review

agents.name: PRO_SUPPORTER_3
agents.description: Mixed: supply concerns vs. ASP uplift optimism

agents.name: NEUTRAL_1
agents.description: Independent reviewer; eventually recommended iPhone X

agents.name: PRO_SUPPORTER_2
agents.description: Initial sticker shock coverage shifted to positive reviews post-launch

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_3
agents.description: Would buy regardless; drove pre-order sellout

agents.name: AGAINST_LEADER_1
agents.description: Sticker shock: $999 seen as excessive; considered AGAINST_LEADER_2 alternatives

agents.name: AGAINST_LEADER_2
agents.description: Mocked notch design and price; Samsung Galaxy S8 comparisons

notes: Blinded: entity names, geography, and absolute dates redacted. Numeric fields preserved.
